summary: PayPal announced 2,000 job cuts as part of a restructuring that CEO Alex Chriss framed around AI-driven efficiency. The company stated AI automation of routine payment processing and fraud detection tasks would reduce operational headcount needs.
ceo_quote: We are doing this to right-size our business, allowing us to move with the speed needed to deliver for our customers and drive profitable growth through AI-powered automation.

evidence.description: CEO cited AI-powered automation as driver of operational restructuring.

ai_technology: AI-powered fraud detection and payment automation
